full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-28014

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-28014.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libkdumpfile-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm
libkdumpfile-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.i686.rpm
libkdumpfile-devel-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm
libkdumpfile-devel-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.i686.rpm
libkdumpfile-doc-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
libkdumpfile-util-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm
python3-libkdumpfile-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
libkdumpfile-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm
libkdumpfile-devel-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm
libkdumpfile-doc-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
libkdumpfile-util-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm
python3-libkdumpfile-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/libkdumpfile-0.5.5-1.0.2.el9.src.rpm
